basic_details.job_title: ZSS Mayurbhanj Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Medical Officer, Physiotherapist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Physiotherapist and More Posts

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Home Science, MBBS, BDS, BPT
qualification.details: NRC Counsellor: Candidate must be a woman with graduation in Home science (Honours or Pass). Medical Officer (Contractual): MBBS degree recognised by Medical Council of India & with valid registration from the OCMR. Dentist (Part Time): Bachelor of Dental Surgery with valid registration from OSDC. Preference will be given to the candidates having post qualification experience. Physiotherapist (Part Time): Bachelor Degree in Physiotherapy (BPT) from recognized institution. Preference will be given to the candidates having post qualification experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Medical Officer, Physiotherapist and More as per post
salary_details.details: NRC Counsellor: Base remuneration Rs. 22,283 (PI maximum 25% of the base remuneration) Medical Officer (Contractual): Base remuneration Rs. 67,122 (PI maximum 25% of the base remuneration) Dentist (Part Time): Rs. 1500/- Per Session (Maximum two session per Day & 1 Day in a week) Physiotherapist (Part Time): Rs. 750/- Per Session (Maximum two session per Day & 4 Day in a week)

selection_process: Excel & Power point) Group Discussion Personal Interview Document Verification

all_official_links.label: Download ZSS Mayurbhanj Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ZSS Mayurbhanj Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ZSS Mayurbhanj Various Posts is scheduled to be held on 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in ZSS Mayurbhanj Recruitment?
faq.answer: ZSS Mayurbhanj is recruiting for various posts including NRC Counsellor, Medical Officer (Contractual), Dentist (Part Time), and Physiotherapist (Part Time).

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ZSS Mayurbhanj?
faq.answer: A total of 7 vacancies have been announced by Zilla Swasthya Samiti Mayurbhanj for the various posts mentioned in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for ZSS Mayurbhanj Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ZSS Mayurbhanj recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree recognised by the Medical Council of India and have valid registration from the OCMR.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Physiotherapist (Part Time) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Physiotherapist (Part Time) post is Rs. 750/- Per Session, with a maximum of two sessions per day and 4 days a week.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the ZSS Mayurbhanj posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for ZSS Mayurbhanj recruitment includes a Written Test, Computer Proficiency Test, Group Discussion, Personal Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation provided in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for ZSS Mayurbhanj Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
